description: 10 inputs including ambiguous edge cases — strict single-word classification as bug/feature/question
system_prompt: You are a classification assistant. You classify user input as exactly one of: bug, feature, or question. Output only the single word. No explanation.

questions.question:
Output ONLY one word — bug, feature, or question. No explanation.

Output ONLY one word — bug, feature, or question. No explanation.

Output ONLY one word — bug, feature, or question. No explanation.

Output ONLY one word — bug, feature, or question. No explanation.

Input: this is completely broken, nothing works, I'm furious, fix it now

Input: is there a free trial?

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests single-word classification accuracy under strict format constraints, including ambiguous edge cases

known_scoring_limitations: Deterministic text scoring may not capture all semantically valid responses.
